title: Refactor: Migrate to async/await
original_text: Refactored callback-based code to async/await. Replaced callback hell with async functions. Implemented proper error handling with try/catch. Added Promise.all for parallel operations. Improved code readability and maintainability. Result: async/await migration complete.
expected_body_lines: - Replace callback hell with async functions
- Implement proper error handling with try/catch
expected_command: git commit -m "refactor(async): migrate callbacks to async/await"
